1.en: Although the book was very long, I finished it in two days.
1.blank: __________ the book was very long, I finished it in two days.

1.en: We enjoyed our camping trip although it rained almost every night.
1.blank: We enjoyed our camping trip ___ it rained almost every night.

1.en: Although working under extreme pressure, the medical team remained focused.
1.tr: Aşırı baskı altında çalışıyor olmalarına rağmen, tıbbi ekip odaklanmış durumda kaldı.

1.en: Although all the evidence suggested otherwise, the company refused to admit its mistake.
1.tr: Tüm kanıtlar aksini göstermesine rağmen, şirket hatasını kabul etmeyi reddetti.

1.en: However excellent the design may be, it won't sell without proper marketing.
1.blank: __________ excellent the design may be, it won't sell without proper marketing.

1.en: She went to work even though she was feeling very sick.
1.blank: She went to work __________ she was feeling very sick.

1.en: They bought the house even though they knew it needed a lot of repairs.
1.blank: They bought the house ___ they knew it needed a lot of repairs.

1.en: Even though you finished the work on time, you wouldn't be promoted.
1.tr: İşi zamanında bitirmiş olsan bile terfi ettirilmezdin.

1.en: Even though their languages were completely different, the two communities lived in peace for centuries.
1.tr: Dilleri tamamen farklı olmasına rağmen, iki topluluk yüzyıllarca barış içinde yaşadı.

1.en: Even though he had no formal training, his performance was flawless.
1.blank: Choose the correct structure: '__________ he had no formal training, his performance was flawless.'

1.en: I don't like his attitude. He is a good teacher, though.
1.blank: I don't like his attitude. He is a good teacher, __________.

1.en: The food was delicious, though the service was quite slow.
1.blank: The food was delicious, ___ the service was quite slow.

1.en: Veli is a poor guy; he doesn't economize, though.
1.tr: Veli fakir bir adam; yine de para biriktirmiyor (tutumlu davranmıyor).

1.en: Tired though he was after the long journey, he attended the meeting.
1.blank: Tired __________ he was after the long journey, he attended the meeting.

1.en: The strategy, though risky in the short term, proved to be highly lucrative.
1.blank: The strategy, ___ risky in the short term, proved to be highly lucrative.

1.en: Much as I want to help you, I simply do not have the time right now.
1.blank: __________ I want to help you, I simply do not have the time right now.

1.en: Much as they admired his intellect, they could not support his radical methods.
1.blank: ___ they admired his intellect, they could not support his radical methods.

1.en: Much as she loves traveling, she hates long airplane flights.
1.tr: Seyahat etmeyi çok sevmesine rağmen, uzun uçak yolculuklarından nefret eder.

1.en: Much as I would like to work with him, I cannot accept his offer.
1.tr: Onunla çalışmak istememe rağmen, teklifini kabul edemem.

1.en: Much as (Yanlış - tam cümle ister) his great desire to win, he refused to train.
1.blank: Identify the illegal structure: '__________ his great desire to win, he refused to train.'

1.en: Despite his great effort, he lost the match.
1.blank: __________ his great effort, he lost the match.

1.en: They arrived on time in spite of the heavy traffic on the highway.
1.blank: They arrived on time ___ the heavy traffic on the highway.

1.en: In spite of the frustrating figures on the list, the economy is stable.
1.tr: Listedeki sinir bozucu rakamlara rağmen, ekonomi istikrarlı.

1.en: In spite of the fact that she was injured, she completed the marathon.
1.blank: __________ the fact that she was injured, she completed the marathon.

1.en: The tablet is affordable, but it lacks a high-resolution screen.
1.blank: The tablet is affordable, __________ it lacks a high-resolution screen.

1.en: Kelly was a convicted criminal, yet many people admired him.
1.blank: Kelly was a convicted criminal, ___ many people admired him.

1.en: The air conditioner is working, but it is still hot inside.
1.tr: Klima çalışıyor ama içerisi hala sıcak.

1.en: The project budget was extremely limited, yet the team did a wonderful job.
1.tr: Proje bütçesi son derece kısıtlıydı, yine de ekip harika bir iş çıkardı.

1.en: The air conditioner is working; however , it is still hot inside.
1.blank: The air conditioner is working; __________ , it is still hot inside.

1.en: The initial results were promising. However , further testing revealed several bugs.
1.blank: The initial results were promising. ___ , further testing revealed several bugs.

1.en: However advanced the AI model is, it still requires human supervision.
1.tr: Yapay zeka modeli ne kadar gelişmiş olursa olsun, yine de insan denetimi gerektirir.

1.en: The new engine is powerful; however, it consumes too much fuel.
1.tr: Yeni motor güçlüdür; ancak çok fazla yakıt tüketiyor.

1.en: The director, however , decided to reject the proposal despite the board's approval.
1.blank: The director, __________ , decided to reject the proposal despite the board's approval.

1.en: The economic data was discouraging; nevertheless , the stock market reached an all-time high.
1.blank: The economic data was discouraging; __________ , the stock market reached an all-time high.

1.en: There were serious security concerns. Nonetheless , the festival organizers decided to proceed.
1.blank: There were serious security concerns. ___ , the festival organizers decided to proceed.

1.en: The training was short and intense. Even so, the staff mastered the new software.
1.tr: Eğitim kısa ve yoğundu. Böyle olsa bile (Yine de), personel yeni yazılımda uzmanlaştı.

1.en: The journey was dangerous; nevertheless, they refused to give up.
1.tr: Yolculuk tehlikeliydi; buna rağmen, vazgeçmeyi reddettiler.

1.en: Working from home offers great flexibility. On the other hand , it can lead to isolation.
1.blank: Working from home offers great flexibility. __________ , it can lead to isolation.

1.en: Nuclear energy is highly efficient. On the other hand , the disposal of radioactive waste remains unsolved.
1.blank: Nuclear energy is highly efficient. ___ , the disposal of radioactive waste remains unsolved.

1.en: The new framework is fast. On the other hand, it has a steep learning curve.
1.tr: Yeni altyapı (framework) hızlıdır. Diğer yandan, dik bir öğrenme eğrisine sahip.

1.en: Tourism increases revenues; on the other hand, it damages the local ecosystem.
1.tr: Turizm gelirleri artırıyor; diğer yandan, yerel ekosisteme zarar veriyor.

1.en: In Turkey, the summer is usually hot, whereas in England it is often rainy.
1.blank: In Turkey, the summer is usually hot, __________ in England it is often rainy.

1.en: Some people prefer saving their money, while others enjoy spending it immediately.
1.blank: Some people prefer saving their money, ___ others enjoy spending it immediately.

1.en: When medical professionals are treating dog bites, some wounds are left open, whereas others require stitches.
1.tr: Tıp uzmanları köpek ısırıklarını tedavi ederken, bazı yaralar açık bırakılır, oysaki diğerleri dikiş gerektirir.

1.en: In animals, many metabolites are obtained by the digestion of food, whereas in plants, only the basic starting materials are externally derived.
1.tr: Hayvanlarda birçok metabolit yiyeceklerin sindirilmesiyle elde edilirken, bitkilerde sadece temel başlangıç maddeleri dışarıdan alınır.

1.en: Identify the correct position: 'While master's programs focus on coursework, doctoral programs require original research.'
1.blank: Identify the correct position: '__________ master's programs focus on coursework, doctoral programs require original research.'

1.en: Unlike his brother, who loves sports, Tom prefers reading books.
1.blank: __________ his brother, who loves sports, Tom prefers reading books.

1.en: Unlike traditional cars, electric vehicles produce zero direct emissions.
1.blank: ___ traditional cars, electric vehicles produce zero direct emissions.

1.en: Unlike the previous software model, the upgraded version runs smoothly without any lag.
1.tr: Önceki yazılım modelinin aksine, yükseltilmiş versiyon herhangi bir gecikme olmadan sorunsuz çalışıyor.

1.en: Despite (Doğru - beklenti aksı) the fact that she is usually introverted, she spoke confidently at the conference.
1.blank: __________ the fact that she is usually introverted, she spoke confidently at the conference.

1.en: Unlike gold, which is highly unreactive, iron rusts quickly when exposed to moisture.
1.blank: __________ gold, which is highly unreactive, iron rusts quickly when exposed to moisture.

1.exTitle: Alıştırma 3: Contrary to & As opposed to
1.en: Contrary to popular belief, bats are not actually blind.
1.blank: __________ popular belief, bats are not actually blind.

1.exTitle: Alıştırma 3: Contrary to & As opposed to
1.en: The company selected a centralized framework, as opposed to a decentralized one.
1.blank: The company selected a centralized framework, ___ a decentralized one.

1.exTitle: Alıştırma 3: Contrary to & As opposed to
1.en: Contrary to initial forecasts, the economic sector registered an immense growth.
1.tr: İlk tahminlerin aksine, ekonomik sektör muazzam bir büyüme kaydetti.

1.exTitle: Alıştırma 3: Contrary to & As opposed to
1.en: Investors want to see tangible results, as opposed to theoretical promises.
1.tr: Yatırımcılar teorik vaatlerin aksine somut sonuçlar görmek istiyorlar.

1.exTitle: Alıştırma 3: Contrary to & As opposed to
1.en: Identify the grammatically correct prepositional setup:
1.word: In contrast with the old laws, the new ones are flexible.
1.blank: Identify the grammatically correct prepositional setup:

1.en: High tariff walls protect domestic industries; conversely , they reduce international trade volumes.
1.blank: High tariff walls protect domestic industries; __________ , they reduce international trade volumes.

1.en: An increase in price reduces demand. Conversely , a sharp decrease in price usually stimulates it.
1.blank: An increase in price reduces demand. ___ , a sharp decrease in price usually stimulates it.

1.en: Some algorithms prioritize speed over accuracy; conversely, others value precision above all else.
1.tr: Bazı algoritmalar doğruluğa kıyasla hıza öncelik verir; aksine, diğerleri her şeyden önce hassasiyete değer verir.

1.en: Large department stores offer a wide variety of products; conversely, boutique shops specialize in niche items.
1.tr: Büyük mağazalar geniş bir ürün yelpazesi sunar; tersine, butik dükkanlar özel ürünlerde uzmanlaşmıştır.

1.en: The ozone hole is potentially dangerous because the ozone in the atmosphere prevents ultraviolet light.
1.blank: The ozone hole is potentially dangerous __________ the ozone in the atmosphere prevents ultraviolet light.

1.en: We decided to stay at home since it was snowing heavily outside.
1.blank: We decided to stay at home ___ it was snowing heavily outside.

1.en: As the laboratory equipment was outdated, the results were highly inaccurate.
1.tr: Laboratuvar ekipmanları eski olduğu için, sonuçlar son derece hatalıydı.

1.en: The camera was not working, for the technical crew had forgotten to check the batteries.
1.tr: Kamera çalışmıyordu çünkü teknik ekip pilleri kontrol etmeyi unutmuştu.

1.en: The new algorithm is revolutionary in that it process data in parallel layers.
1.blank: The new algorithm is revolutionary __________ it process data in parallel layers.

1.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: Now that, Seeing that & Given that
1.en: Now that you have completed the advanced training, you can now operate the system alone.
1.blank: __________ you have completed the advanced training, you can now operate the system alone.

1.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: Now that, Seeing that & Given that
1.en: Seeing that the global economy is unstable, investors are moving towards gold.
1.blank: ___ the global economy is unstable, investors are moving towards gold.

1.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: Now that, Seeing that & Given that
1.en: Given that the evidence is undeniable, the court must declare a verdict.
1.tr: Kanıtların yadsınamaz olduğu göz önüne alındığında, mahkeme bir karar açıklamalıdır.

1.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: Now that, Seeing that & Given that
1.en: Now that you have graduated, you should start looking for a professional job.
1.tr: Mademki mezun oldun, kendine profesyonel bir iş aramaya başlamalısın.

1.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: Now that, Seeing that & Given that
1.en: Which of the following cannot be followed directly by a full noun phrase without a verb?
1.blank: Which of the following cannot be followed directly by a full noun phrase without a verb?

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: Because of, Due to & Owing to
2.en: The flight was severely delayed because of the thick fog covering the runway.
2.blank: The flight was severely delayed __________ the thick fog covering the runway.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: Because of, Due to & Owing to
2.en: Due to his excellent communication skills, he was chosen as the group leader.
2.blank: ___ his excellent communication skills, he was chosen as the group leader.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: Because of, Due to & Owing to
2.en: Owing to unexpected technical difficulties, the server will be offline.
2.tr: Beklenmedik teknik zorluklardan dolayı, sunucu çevrimdışı olacak.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: Because of, Due to & Owing to
2.en: The football match had to be postponed due to the heavy rain.
2.tr: Şiddetli yağmur nedeniyle futbol maçı ertelenmek zorunda kaldı.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: Because of, Due to & Owing to
2.en: Due to the fact that the company lost its major investor, the project was cancelled.
2.blank: __________ the fact that the company lost its major investor, the project was cancelled.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: On account of, In view of & Thanks to
2.en: The festival was cancelled on account of public safety concerns raised by the police.
2.blank: The festival was cancelled __________ public safety concerns raised by the police.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: On account of, In view of & Thanks to
2.en: In view of the latest medical reports, the treatment was stopped immediately.
2.blank: ___ the latest medical reports, the treatment was stopped immediately.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: On account of, In view of & Thanks to
2.en: The employee was dismissed on the grounds of professional misconduct.
2.tr: Çalışan, mesleki suiistimal gerekçesiyle (zemininde) işten çıkarıldı.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: On account of, In view of & Thanks to
2.en: Thanks to the new technology, surgeons can perform operations remotely.
2.tr: Yeni teknoloji sayesinde, cerrahlar ameliyatları uzaktan gerçekleştirebiliyor.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: On account of, In view of & Thanks to
2.en: By reason of the intense heat and lack of water, the expedition team turned back.
2.blank: __________ the intense heat and lack of water, the expedition team turned back.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: Therefore, Hence & Thus
2.en: The roads were icy and dangerous, so we drove extremely slowly.
2.blank: The roads were icy and dangerous, __________ we drove extremely slowly.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: Therefore, Hence & Thus
2.en: In a natural disaster, seconds of warning are really vital; therefore , scientists use the latest advances to predict them.
2.blank: In a natural disaster, seconds of warning are really vital; ___ , scientists use the latest advances to predict them.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: Therefore, Hence & Thus
2.en: The company failed to adapt to digital trends; consequently, it went bankrupt.
2.tr: Şirket dijital trendlere uyum sağlayamadı; sonuç olarak iflas etti.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: Therefore, Hence & Thus
2.en: The factory leaked toxic waste, thereby destroying the fish population in the river.
2.tr: Fabrika zehirli atık sızdırdı, bu sebeple nehirdeki balık popülasyonunu yok etti.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: Therefore, Hence & Thus
2.en: Select the grammatically illegal sentence structure for 'Therefore':
2.word: He was late, therefore he missed the train.
2.blank: Select the grammatically illegal sentence structure for 'Therefore':

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: As a result, Consequently & That's why
2.en: The country lacks natural resources; hence , it depends heavily on imports.
2.blank: The country lacks natural resources; __________ , it depends heavily on imports.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: As a result, Consequently & That's why
2.en: The experiment was conducted under strict vacuum; thus , no contamination occurred.
2.blank: The experiment was conducted under strict vacuum; ___ , no contamination occurred.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: As a result, Consequently & That's why
2.en: The price of oil tripled. As a result, global shipping costs increased dramatically.
2.tr: Petrol fiyatı üç katına çıktı. Sonuç olarak, küresel nakliye maliyetleri çarpıcı bir şekilde arttı.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: As a result, Consequently & That's why
2.en: The ozone layer blocks dangerous rays; that's why a hole in it is potentially dangerous.
2.tr: Ozon tabakası güneşin zararlı ışınlarını engeller; bu yüzden delik olması tehlikelidir.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: As well as, In addition to & Along with
2.en: The resort has untouched forests as well as several valuable minerals.
2.blank: The resort has untouched forests __________ several valuable minerals.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: As well as, In addition to & Along with
2.en: In addition to renting the venue, we also had to pay for the catering services.
2.blank: ___ renting the venue, we also had to pay for the catering services.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: As well as, In addition to & Along with
2.en: Along with core engineering subjects, students must select a humanities course.
2.tr: Temel mühendislik derslerinin yanı sıra (ile birlikte), öğrenciler bir beşeri bilimler dersi seçmelidir[cite: 10].

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: As well as, In addition to & Along with
2.en: Apart from English, he is also learning German to compete in the global market.
2.tr: İngilizceden başka, küresel pazarda rekabet edebilmek için Almanca da öğreniyor.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: As well as, In addition to & Along with
2.en: Besides the heavy fines, the company faced a complete suspension of its license.
2.blank: __________ the heavy fines, the company faced a complete suspension of its license.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: Furthermore, Moreover, Likewise & Similarly
2.en: The new laptop is lightweight; furthermore , its battery lasts up to 15 hours.
2.blank: The new laptop is lightweight; __________ , its battery lasts up to 15 hours.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: Furthermore, Moreover, Likewise & Similarly
2.en: The marketing strategy boosted local sales. Moreover , it attracted international buyers.
2.blank: The marketing strategy boosted local sales. ___ , it attracted international buyers.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: Furthermore, Moreover, Likewise & Similarly
2.en: The first experiment failed due to temperature spikes; similarly, the second one suffered from power instability.
2.tr: İlk deney sıcaklık artışları nedeniyle başarısız oldu; benzer şekilde, ikincisi de güç kararsızlığından zarar gördü.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: Furthermore, Moreover, Likewise & Similarly
2.en: The software is highly secure; furthermore, it is extremely easy to use.
2.tr: Yazılım çok güvenli; üstelik, kullanımı son derece kolaydır.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: For example, For instance & Such as
2.en: The first generation antihistamines may produce side effects, such as drowsiness and dry mouth.
2.blank: The first generation antihistamines may produce side effects, __________ drowsiness and dry mouth.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: For example, For instance & Such as
2.en: The Earth has a unique set of characteristics; for instance , it has an atmosphere that supports life.
2.blank: The Earth has a unique set of characteristics; ___ , it has an atmosphere that supports life.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: For example, For instance & Such as
2.en: To illustrate the issue, the professor drew a detailed diagram on the board.
2.tr: Konuyu örneklendirmek (açıklamak) için, profesör tahtaya detaylı bir şema çizdi.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: For example, For instance & Such as
2.en: Developing countries, for example Brazil and India, exhibit rapid economic growth.
2.tr: Gelişmekte olan ülkeler, örneğin Brezilya ve Hindistan, hızlı ekonomik büyüme sergiliyor.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: For example, For instance & Such as
2.en: Many clean energy sources exist, such as (Doğru - arkasından isim gelir)[cite: 10] solar and wind power.
2.blank: Choose the correct format: 'Many clean energy sources exist, __________ solar and wind power.'

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: In other words, Namely & That is to say
2.en: The patient is completely asymptomatic; in other words , she shows no signs of illness.
2.blank: The patient is completely asymptomatic; __________ , she shows no signs of illness.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: In other words, Namely & That is to say
2.en: We need to focus on our primary goal, namely , increasing user engagement.
2.blank: We need to focus on our primary goal, ___ , increasing user engagement.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: In other words, Namely & That is to say
2.en: The contract will expire in 24 hours; that is to say, you must sign it today.
2.tr: Sözleşmenin süresi 24 saat içinde dolacak; başka bir söylemle (yani), bugün imzalamanız gerekiyor[cite: 10].

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: In other words, Namely & That is to say
2.en: After long discussions, the committee eventually reached a decision.
2.tr: Uzun tartışmalardan sonra, komite nihayet bir karara vardı.

2.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: In other words, Namely & That is to say
2.en: The system operates on a binary logic; that is , it recognizes only true or false inputs.
2.blank: The system operates on a binary logic; __________ , it recognizes only true or false inputs.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: Neither...nor, Either...or & Both...and
3.en: The Earth is neither / nor too hot, like Mercury, neither / nor too cold, like distant Mars.
3.blank: The Earth is __________ too hot, like Mercury, __________ too cold, like distant Mars.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: Neither...nor, Either...or & Both...and
3.en: You can choose either / or the online course either / or the weekend seminar.
3.blank: You can choose ___ the online course __________ the weekend seminar.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: Neither...nor, Either...or & Both...and
3.en: Both the manager and the employees were satisfied with the new policy.
3.tr: Hem müdür hem de çalışanlar yeni politikadan memnun kaldılar.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: Neither...nor, Either...or & Both...and
3.en: Neither the storm nor the heavy snowfall prevented the plane from taking off.
3.tr: Ne fırtına ne de yoğun kar yağışı uçağın kalkmasını engelleyemedi.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: Neither...nor, Either...or & Both...and
3.en: Neither the director nor the actors were (Doğru - 'actors' çoğul olduğu için) present at the rehearsal yesterday.
3.blank: Neither the director nor the actors __________ present at the rehearsal yesterday.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: Not only...but also & The more...the more
3.en: The experience was so / that fascinating so / that I will never forget it.
3.blank: The experience was __________ fascinating __________ I will never forget it.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: Not only...but also & The more...the more
3.en: It was such / that a complex algorithm such / that the junior developers couldn't solve it.
3.blank: It was ___ a complex algorithm __________ the junior developers couldn't solve it.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: Not only...but also & The more...the more
3.en: Whether we win or lose, the effort we put in is what truly matters.
3.tr: İster kazanalım ister kaybedelim, ortaya koyduğumuz çaba asıl önemli olandır.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: Not only...but also & The more...the more
3.en: The more you practice, the more fluently you speak.
3.tr: Ne kadar çok pratik yaparsan, o kadar akıcı konuşursun.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: Not only...but also & The more...the more
3.en: Identify the legal inverted (devrik) structure for emphatic addition:
3.word: Not only did he pass the exam, but he also got the highest score.
3.blank: Identify the legal inverted (devrik) structure for emphatic addition:

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: In order to, So as to & To
3.en: He woke up early in order to catch the first train to Ankara.
3.blank: He woke up early __________ catch the first train to Ankara.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: In order to, So as to & To
3.en: We packed our bags quickly so as to not be late for the flight.
3.blank: We packed our bags quickly ___ not be late for the flight.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: In order to, So as to & To
3.en: Scientists used the latest advances in an attempt to predict the natural disaster.
3.tr: Bilim insanları, doğal afeti tahmin etmek amacıyla (teşebbüsüyle) en son gelişmeleri kullandılar.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: In order to, So as to & To
3.en: The government announced a new economic package with the aim of reducing inflation.
3.tr: Hükümet, enflasyonu düşürmek amacıyla yeni bir ekonomik paket açıkladı.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: In order to, So as to & To
3.en: Identify the grammatically correct purpose structure followed by a verb phrase:
3.word: The firm hired an expert so as to improve its security.
3.blank: Identify the grammatically correct purpose structure followed by a verb phrase:

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: So that & In order that
3.en: He left the door open so that the dog could go out easily.
3.blank: He left the door open __________ the dog could go out easily.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: So that & In order that
3.en: The encrypted file was hidden in order that unauthorized users in order that they might not access it.
3.blank: The encrypted file was hidden ___ unauthorized users in order that they might not access it.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: So that & In order that
3.en: The engine was modified so that it would consume less fuel.
3.tr: Motor, daha az yakıt tüketsin diye (tüketmesi amacıyla) modifiye edildi.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: So that & In order that
3.en: We changed the meeting time so that everyone could attend.
3.tr: Herkes katılabilsin diye toplantı saatini değiştirdik.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: So that & In order that
3.en: Choose the correct purpose link: 'They locked the laboratory gates in order that no one could enter without permission.'
3.blank: Choose the correct purpose link: 'They locked the laboratory gates __________ no one could enter without permission.'

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: Except for, Aside from & Apart from
3.en: The laboratory is open every day except for Sundays.
3.blank: The laboratory is open every day __________ Sundays.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: Except for, Aside from & Apart from
3.en: Aside from a few minor errors, the software architecture is absolutely flawless.
3.blank: ___ a few minor errors, the software architecture is absolutely flawless.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: Except for, Aside from & Apart from
3.en: The committee approved all segments of the budget, excluding the final project.
3.tr: Komite, son proje hariç (hariç tutularak), bütçenin tüm segmentlerini onayladı.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: Except for, Aside from & Apart from
3.en: Apart from the cost factor, the plan seems perfect in every aspect.
3.tr: Maliyet faktörü hariç, plan her açıdan mükemmel görünüyor.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: In terms of, In accordance with & According to
3.en: According to recent studies, your biological clock can be confused by computer light.
3.blank: __________ recent studies, your biological clock can be confused by computer light.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: In terms of, In accordance with & According to
3.en: The project was a huge success in terms of revenue, but not in terms of user satisfaction.
3.blank: The project was a huge success ___ revenue, but not in terms of user satisfaction.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: In terms of, In accordance with & According to
3.en: All chemical procedures must be carried out in accordance with safety regulations.
3.tr: Tüm kimyasal prosedürler güvenlik düzenlemeleri ile uyumlu olarak (uygunca) yürütülmelidir.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: In terms of, In accordance with & According to
3.en: Major changes will be implemented in the company policy as of July.
3.tr: Şirket politikasında Temmuz ayı itibarıyla büyük değişiklikler uygulanacak.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 1: In terms of, In accordance with & According to
3.en: The committee voted in favor of the new design, abandoning the old prototype completely.
3.blank: The committee voted __________ the new design, abandoning the old prototype completely.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: Instead of, Rather than & For the sake of
3.en: We should use clean energy sources instead of burning fossil fuels.
3.blank: We should use clean energy sources __________ burning fossil fuels.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: Instead of, Rather than & For the sake of
3.en: Investors prefer to see tangible results rather than theoretical promises.
3.blank: Investors prefer to see tangible results ___ theoretical promises.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: Instead of, Rather than & For the sake of
3.en: The scientist dedicated his entire life to research for the sake of humanity.
3.tr: Bilim insanı tüm hayatını insanlık uğruna (hatırına/iyiliği için) araştırmaya adadı.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: Instead of, Rather than & For the sake of
3.en: They didn't buy a car; instead, they leased an electric vehicle for a year.
3.tr: Araba satın almadılar; onun yerine, bir yıllığına elektrikli bir araç kiraladiler.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 2: Instead of, Rather than & For the sake of
3.en: Choose the illegal structure before a noun phrase: 'They used a digital tool instead (YANLIŞ - arkasından isim alamaz)[cite: 10] the manual calculation.'
3.blank: Choose the illegal structure before a noun phrase: 'They used a digital tool __________ the manual calculation.'

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 3: As if, As though, When it comes to & By means of
3.en: He talked about the complex quantum theory as if he were an expert in that field.
3.blank: He talked about the complex quantum theory __________ he were an expert in that field.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 3: As if, As though, When it comes to & By means of
3.en: When it comes to data security, the firm leaves nothing to chance.
3.blank: ___ data security, the firm leaves nothing to chance.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 3: As if, As though, When it comes to & By means of
3.en: The satellite tracks environmental changes by means of advanced optical sensors.
3.tr: Uydu, gelişmiş optik sensörler vasıtasıyla (yoluyla) çevresel değişiklikleri takip eder.

3.exTitle: Alıştırma 3: As if, As though, When it comes to & By means of
3.en: The company is currently on the verge of bankruptcy.
3.tr: Şirket şu anda iflasın eşiğinde bulunuyor.
